title: Minecraft LPT Fancy
description: Just a small vanilla+ modpack with fancy mods, enjoy 1.21 gameplay with visual improvements and a few more mobs.
body:
LPT Fancy Modded is a mod package that is intended to provide a vanilla-like gaming experience with a focus on multiplayer.

There are some mods for visual enhancement such as:
3D Skin Layers
Advancement Plagues
Blur+
Detail Armor Bar
Falling Leaves
Visuality
Sodium
and many more.

We also got some content mods like:
Ducklings
Copper Hopper
Expanded Storage
Elytra Trims


The overall intention is to play this modpack on a server with your friends.
Experience a vanilla like Minecraft with a few improvements and proximity voice chat!


Note:
The preconfigured shader is very perfomance heavy, consider disabling it, if you are playing on lower end hardware.
